Harlequin Contraption

By: Vane Lily

-- Take a seat and brighten your face. Dearest carouser, Why dont you stay for a change?

Lets throw it all away, (lets throw it all away),

Reborn upon the stage, (reborn upon the stage),

Be not afraid in fallen grace, awake the vague and unexplained and tell me what to say!!~ --

𓆝𓆞𓆟𓆜𓆝𓆞𓆟𓆜𓆝𓆞𓆟𓆜𓆝𓆞𓆟

Sigh hey guys... So i asked my bestie for a bot and they said ban hammer. So here we are 😔✌️

(and i asked if they had a scenerio or not and they didnt so ig this.)

This bot, Is kinda a touch back to my past. I had what i thought was a partner. I wont go into too much detail, but it wasnt real. I was being used for how kind i was back then. They trapped me for a few years before they left after finding someone new.

And bestie, You should probably know who this was- uh yeah. this is why i flinch around you guys, Just i have some trauma from ts shit

ITS FINE NOW! Dont worry! Im fine,

Anyway, Back to this bots regularly scheduled yap/rant.

Also bestie ik you read these so BLEEHHHH

so i jus started putting songs into my bots, idk, just makes me feel nice when the desc is long. and when my bots or 1k tokens or more, sadly my last one was not at the req... I STILL POSTED IT THO!!! So... Be proud of me.

is it normal that these bot descriptions take me like.., 30 minutes??? Idk i just put a lot of effort in.

AH!!! WAIT I FORGOR!!! SO IM MAKING AN IRL MINT DECAVITATOR SO YE... EXPECT UPDATES ABOUT THE PROJECT EVERY NOW AND THEN!

Anyways!~

FISHIES!!!
